name: Clark & Washington Attorneys and Counselors at Law
description_short: Nashville-based bankruptcy law firm specializing in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings with 35 years of experience. Offers remote filing options with $0 down for Chapter 13 plans.
description_long:
Clark & Washington, P.C. is a bankruptcy law firm based in Nashville, Tennessee, with three metro area locations. Founded with over 35 years of personal bankruptcy experience, the firm positions itself as "Nashville's Largest Bankruptcy Filer" and handles both Chapter 7 liquidations and Chapter 13 reorganization plans. The firm adapted to pandemic conditions by offering phone-based consultations and remote filing capabilities, eliminating the need for in-person office visits.

The firm's core services include preparation and filing of bankruptcy petitions, representation at court hearings, customized payment plan creation, same-day credit report procurement, and in-office credit counseling. For Chapter 13 filers, they advertise $0 upfront with all legal fees incorporated into the bankruptcy plan itself. For Chapter 7 cases, clients pay legal fees separately. The firm handles the complete paperwork process and requests tax transcripts on behalf of clients.

Key distinguishing factors include their remote filing capability implemented during COVID-19, their emphasis on flexible payment plans tailored to individual circumstances, complimentary initial consultations with an attorney, and in-house credit counseling services. The firm's 35-year tenure and self-described status as Nashville's largest bankruptcy filer suggest established market presence and volume.

Potential concerns include limited transparency about Chapter 7 fee structures on the website, no published fee schedule for either chapter type, and reliance on contact forms for pricing inquiries. As a debt relief agency, the firm is required to provide bankruptcy code disclaimers. The website lacks client testimonials, ratings, or specific case outcomes, making it difficult to assess service quality or client satisfaction independently.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: $0 down payment required to start Chapter 13 cases with all legal fees included in the plan
Remote phone-based filing available with no office visit required
Free initial attorney consultation with no charge for case discussion
Comprehensive service package including court representation at all hearings
Same-day credit report procurement as part of their service offering
In-house credit counseling services available to clients
35 years of documented personal bankruptcy experience
cons: No published fee schedule on website; Chapter 7 costs must be obtained through contact form
Limited client reviews, testimonials, or success metrics available on website
Website lacks detail on timeline expectations or case completion standards
No information about attorney qualifications, credentials, or bar memberships
Disclaimer states information on website is not legal advice and consultation required before proceeding
best_for: Nashville-area residents filing Chapter 13 bankruptcy seeking low upfront cost options
Individuals preferring remote consultations and phone-based filing processes
Debtors seeking customized payment plan structures tailored to their financial situation
Chapter 7 filers in Tennessee metro areas seeking experienced legal representation
diagnosis: Clark & Washington is best suited for Nashville-area residents seeking Chapter 13 bankruptcy with minimal upfront costs or those preferring remote filing processes. The primary caveat is that specific fee structures for Chapter 7 and detailed service terms are not transparently published on their website, requiring direct contact for pricing information.
services: Chapter 13 bankruptcy filing with customized payment plans
Complete bankruptcy paperwork preparation and submission
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
